risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Over a 5-year period (2020-2024), the insured reported 3 total claims (2020, 2022, 2024) and 2 claim-free years (2021, 2023). No cancellations were recorded. Loss ratios were not provided. Total premiums paid over the period were approximately $2,223,605.68.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Claims were reported in policy years 2020 (Berkshire Hathaway Guard, policy 7CP0004214), 2022 (American International Group, policy CP006315-001), and 2024 (CNA Financial, policy CP-5690-6189). No claims were reported in 2021 (Auto-Owners Insurance) or 2023 (Zurich Insurance Group). No cancellations were issued in any year.
